generated_oml:
instance HeatbedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer measuring heatbed temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalAirTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer measuring internal air temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance ExternalAmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer measuring external ambient temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedTemperatureSensor, InternalAirTemperatureSensor, ExternalAmbientTemperatureSensor
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors transmitted via RabbitMQ"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with uniform air temperature and heat transfer to environment; parameters C_air, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model including heatbed thermal inertia; parameters C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical sensors and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeCalibrationService, SystemMonitoringService, BangBangControlService
]

instance ScipyCalibrationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library used for non-linear least squares optimization in model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeCalibrationService
]

instance OneWireProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire protocol for communication with DS18S20 temperature sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeCalibrationService, SystemMonitoringService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionModelAService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation model for temperature prediction using Model A with parameters C_air and G_box"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionModelBService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation model for temperature prediction using Model B with parameters C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance RealTimeCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time calibration of thermal model parameters using non-linear least squares optimization with Scipy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationInsight
]

instance SystemMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System monitoring for safety and optimality checks based on sensor feedback"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyAlertInsight
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control logic for temperature regulation based on sensor feedback"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHeaterPowerAction, AdjustFanSpeedAction
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive temperature simulation results used for system optimization"
]

instance ModelCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated model parameters resulting from non-linear least squares optimization"
]

instance SafetyAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety alerts generated during system monitoring for out-of-bound conditions"
]

instance AdjustHeaterPowerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control action to switch heatbed on/off based on bang-bang logic"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control action to switch fan on/off based on bang-bang logic"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system comprising styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume), heatbed, fan, three DS18S20 temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply"
    base:contains HeatbedTemperatureSensor, InternalAirTemperatureSensor, ExternalAmbientTemperatureSensor, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, RaspberryPi4, CustomPCB, PowerSupply
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214×214×3 mm) actuated via MOSFETs for high-current switching (4A)"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan (0.02 m³/s airflow) actuated via optocouplers for signal isolation"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware controller for executing control logic"
]

instance CustomPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for safe high-current switching (4A) and signal isolation"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for heatbed and fan actuation"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed) are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes safe state transitions for physical actuation while maintaining device safety protocols."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Fan air circulation time of ~2 seconds (0.02 m³/s airflow over 0.03 m³ volume), heatbed heating response under 2 seconds (100W power), with controller parameters defining heating duration (H) and waiting duration (C) cycles."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A RabbitMQ-orchestrated system where the physical incubator (PT) interacts with digital twin components (simulation models, controller logic, calibration algorithms) via message passing, all hosted on Raspberry Pi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated') of the physical incubator, where the digital twin integrates real-time data from the deployed system for ongoing monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Assumption validation through multi-sensor temperature uniformity experiments, model calibration via least squares optimization to minimize residual error between predicted and measured data, with Model B showing superior accuracy for thermal inertia prediction."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ-based messaging for PT-DT communication, 1-Wire bus for sensor connectivity, and GPIO interfaces on Raspberry Pi for hardware control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All digital twin components (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver, simulation models) deployed on a single Raspberry Pi 4 Model B."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates a safe protocol to maintain device safety during actuation, though specific cybersecurity measures are not detailed in the document."
]
